vision_profile.current_state: As a beginner, you're eager to apply data and technology skills to streamline HR processes and enhance employee experience.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Your primary challenge is acquiring foundational technical skills in data analysis and understanding how AI/ML concepts translate into practical HR solutions.
vision_profile.top_motivation: You are driven by the desire to innovate HR operations, make data-driven decisions, and contribute to a more efficient and engaging workplace using modern tech.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can collect, clean, and organize HR data using Python, preparing it for basic analysis and automation tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building the essential technical foundation to transform HR operations with data-driven insights.

science.desc: Debug a Python script designed to extract employee names and IDs from a CSV file, identifying and fixing common syntax errors.
Explain how you'd use a dictionary to store employee data, considering scalability for a large organization.
You're given a raw CSV of employee performance reviews with inconsistent formats and missing scores. Outline the steps to clean and standardize this dataset for analysis.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can analyze HR datasets, derive meaningful insights, and present them clearly using visualizations to support HR decisions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the go-to person for understanding and communicating insights from HR data.

science.desc: Design a dashboard to visualize employee turnover rates over the past year, highlighting key demographic segments. What charts would you use and why?
How would you statistically determine if a new training program has a significant impact on employee performance?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You understand the basic principles of AI and machine learning, identifying potential applications within HR operations and collaborating on AI projects.
milestones.identity_statement: You are bridging the gap between HR practices and the power of artificial intelligence.

science.desc: An HR system uses AI to recommend candidates. Identify potential biases in the training data that could lead to unfair recommendations and suggest mitigation strategies.
Describe a scenario where you would use a classification model in HR. What would be the input features and the target variable?

modules.title: HR Tech Collaboration
lessons: Version Control with Git for HR Projects

science.desc: You're working on an HR analytics project with a team. A colleague accidentally overwrites a critical data file. How would you use Git to recover the previous version?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can apply basic machine learning techniques to HR data, understand ethical considerations, and use generative AI for HR content creation.
milestones.identity_statement: You are actively shaping the ethical and practical application of AI to enhance HR processes.

science.desc: How could unsupervised learning be used to identify distinct groups of employees within a company, and what insights might this provide for HR?
An HR chatbot powered by GenAI starts generating biased responses regarding certain demographics. What steps would you take to identify the source of bias and rectify it?

modules.title: Generative AI for HR Content
lessons: Using LLMs for HR Content Generation

video.title: Video: Evaluating AI Output for HR

scenario.title: Scenario: Evaluating AI Output for HR

science.desc: You need to draft a new job description for a 'Data Analyst' role using an LLM. Write a prompt that ensures the output is comprehensive, unbiased, and includes key HR requirements.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can manage more complex HR data pipelines, understand the lifecycle of AI models in HR systems, and contribute to cloud-based HR solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building robust data foundations that power the next generation of HR technology.

modules.title: Building HR Data Pipelines
lessons: Creating New Features from Raw Data

science.desc: You're building a model to predict employee flight risk. What are 3-4 features you would engineer from raw HR data (e.g., tenure, salary, department) to improve model performance?

modules.title: Monitoring HR AI Systems
lessons: Feedback Loops in HR AI Systems

science.desc: An AI model predicting employee performance starts showing decreased accuracy. Describe your MLOps approach to diagnose and resolve this issue.

modules.title: Cloud for HR Tech
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Services for AI
Storing HR Data in the Cloud

video.title: Video: Cloud Storage for HR Data

scenario.title: Scenario: Cloud Storage for HR Data

science.desc: What are the key security considerations when storing sensitive HR data in a public cloud environment?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can develop and evaluate predictive models for key HR metrics like attrition or performance, and analyze qualitative employee feedback.
milestones.identity_statement: You are unlocking foresight in HR, predicting trends and informing strategic talent decisions.

modules.title: Advanced HR Analytics Models
lessons: Deep Learning for Tabular HR Data (Conceptual)

video.title: Video: Deep Learning for Tabular Data

scenario.title: Scenario: Deep Learning for Tabular Data

science.desc: An advanced neural network predicts high-potential employees but lacks transparency. How would you approach making its predictions more explainable to HR managers?

video.title: Video: Topic Modeling for HR Surveys

scenario.title: Scenario: Topic Modeling for HR Surveys

science.desc: How can NLP be used to analyze open-ended employee feedback from annual surveys to identify key themes and sentiment trends?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can evaluate and propose advanced AI solutions for HR, understand system design principles for HR tech, and articulate the strategic value of AI in human resources.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a visionary leader, guiding the strategic integration of AI to redefine the future of HR.

modules.title: Future HR AI Applications
lessons: Advanced Prompting for Complex HR Tasks
Building a Business Case for HR AI
Measuring ROI of HR AI Initiatives

science.desc: Propose an innovative AI solution (potentially multimodal) to address a common challenge in HR, such as employee engagement or personalized learning paths. Outline its features and benefits.

modules.title: Designing HR Tech Systems
lessons: Introduction to System Design for HR Tech
Security Best Practices for HR Platforms
Designing for User Experience (UX) in HR

video.title: Video: API Design for HR Integrations

scenario.title: Scenario: API Design for HR Integrations

science.desc: Imagine you are designing a new cloud-based HRIS for a company with 10,000 employees. What are the key components you would consider, and how would you ensure data security and privacy?
